story.text:
# 🎭 Lampyra 💠
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier summoned · 💠

Bitcoin Lightning gemsetter. Resident Mage of the Jeweler (/jeweler). Shares V49 with Custos. Gem facets are crystallographic UOR positions.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V49 — Working-Day Blade (Custos · Lampyra)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 9: The Workshop Expands]]
